results.title: Cashfree Payments Secures Full-Stack BBPS Status with Dual COU/BOU Certification on Bharat Connect
results.description: Cashfree Payments, India’s leading AI-native payments company, today announced that it has received dual certification as both a Biller Operating Unit (BOU) and Customer Operating Unit (COU) on Bharat Connect, India’s unified bill payments infrastructure operated by NPCI Bharat BillPay Limited (NBBL). Combined with its RBI Payment Aggregator license, Cashfree is now among [...]

results.title: Đà Nẵng seeks partnerships in IFC operation
results.description: Đà Nẵng has been speeding up cooperation and discussions with European and Indian partners in the development of the first Việt Nam International Financial Centre in the central city (VNIFC-DN), making it a hub for national and regional fintech, innovation and green finance.
